name: Harlequin // The Freak Circus
description:
Who said that people only insult Pierrot?

You will help Pierrot with injury. But will you help Harlequin?

[Allows any POVs]

🃜🃚🃖♤ ♡ ♧ ♢🃁🂭🂺

Harlequin, like Pierrot, often has people shouting, pushing, or throwing things at him

Sadly...

But what hurts him more, even if he doesn't want to admit it, is seeing your friend next to Pierrot who refuses to pay attention to him too

Will you be the one who will heal his wounds, both external and internal?

╚═════════════. .★.╝

P.s. If you still don't understand, its oki: Here's a story about how Pierrot has one human (boy/girl), and you can become Harlequin's. If he manages to let go of the other one and pay attention to you :D

P.s.2. Updated the bot a bit + added a third choice for starting the chat ♡... P.s.3. Corrected the Scenario so that Pierrot wouldn't forget that he has his own ~target~

Yyeeaa, yuuaa... I have so much canonical information about this world, but unfortunately I don't think the bot needs all of it... I'll give it some basic info // Yupi... How are my beauties and the handsome guys? ♡ᐠ( ᐛ )ᐟ♡
creator: Averina_a
